title: phlegmariurus heteroclitus
intro: Phlegmariurus heteroclitus, also known as the forked polypody, is a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus heteroclitus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, including decoction, infusion, and topical application, although its safe usage and preparation should be studied thoroughly before consumption.
